definitions.text: A person who identifies as male, or animal already known or implied.
examples: That friend of your cousin's, he's on the phone.

definitions.text: They; he or she (a person whose gender is unknown or irrelevant).
examples: The rulebook clearly states that "if any student is caught cheating, he will be expelled", and you were caught cheating, were you not, Anna?

definitions.text: It; an animal whose gender is unknown.
The game of tag, or it, in which the player attempting to catch the others is called "he".
The player who chases and attempts to catch the others in this game.

examples: Is your cat a he or a she?

definitions.text: The name of the fifth letter of many Semitic alphabets (Phoenician, Aramaic, Hebrew, Syriac, Arabic and others).
The name of the first letter of the Old South Arabian abjad.
